import Fixture from './fixture';

const Fixtures : Fixture[] = [
    {
        id: 1,
        date: "9th September",
        result: "W",
        location: "A",
        opposition: "Walton MK Kestrels",        
        oppScore: 0,
        npScore: 8,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
    {

        homeScore: 5,

    },
    {

        awayTeam: "Tigers",
        homeScore: 1,
        awayScore: 9,
        fixture: "League",
        pts: 3
    },
];

export default Fixtures;
